sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50320" key="i)kto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰκτός</orth>, in neut. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰκτόν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἐοικός</foreign>, and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰκτύς·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁμοίωμα, εἰκών</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
